report_metadata.step_description: NOTE: Only process documents with route_to_step=5 (document_category="Site Plan") — the same document set as step 5. For each Site Plan document processed in step 5, extract the complete drawing legend (key) from every page using the vision extraction pipeline defined in proc-extract-site-plan-info step 4. Scan every image chunk of each drawing for a LEGEND, KEY, NOTATION, or SYMBOL TABLE panel. For each visual element in the legend extract: a plain-English description of the symbol or line style, the exact text label as written on the drawing, a category (cable/equipment/substation/boundary/earthing/annotation/other), and the page number it was found on. Assemble all entries across all chunks and all pages into a single structured list per document.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Must return a JSON object with 'total_files' and 'extractions' array containing only Site Plan documents. Each extraction must include 'sub_step_extractions' with the key 'sub-step-extract-legend'. The value of 'sub-step-extract-legend' must be a non-empty JSON array of legend entry objects. Each entry must have: 'page' (integer, 1-based page number the entry was found on), 'symbol_description' (non-empty string describing the visual symbol or line style), 'label' (non-empty string — the exact text label from the drawing), and 'category' (one of: cable, equipment, substation, boundary, earthing, annotation, other). The array must contain at least one entry. Entries with null or empty symbol_description or label indicate incomplete extraction and must be flagged.

files_read.description: Output file produced by the agent
